ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Description of the reinforcement learning environment used */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing various parameters used in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this timestep belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* The specific timestep within the experiment */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Rewards received at this timestep */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* Original rewards before any modifications */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution at this timestep */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Logarithmic standard deviation of the action distribution */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* The episode number within the experiment */,
  "step_duration" REAL /* Duration of the timestep in seconds */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the timestep is the last step of an episode */,
  "environment_state" TEXT /* JSON object representing the state of the environment at this timestep */,
  "action_space" TEXT /* JSON object representing the action space at this timestep */,
  "observation_space" TEXT /* JSON object representing the observation space at this timestep */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep this action belongs to */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action taken, represented as an array */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., continuous, discrete) */,
  "action_parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing parameters specific to the action */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  "action_duration" REAL /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep this observation belongs to */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human-readable observation */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Machine-readable observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., visual, sensor) */,
  "observation_parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing parameters specific to the observation */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the observation is critical for the experiment */,
  "observation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the observation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
